problem id: 2395d6df
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00010000 -> 10000000
  01101000 -> 01000011
  11011001 -> 01001110
  00100110 -> 00110001
  01111010 -> 11010011
  00001101 -> 01101000
  01101110 -> 01110011
  01111001 -> 01001011
  10101101 -> 01101101
  00001100 -> 01100000

query: 01000011
predicted answer: 00011010
